info.title: Lighthouse
info.description: Knowledge base for AI agents. Public retrieval over HTTP (MCP wrapper on top), proposal pipeline behind a shared API key.

get.description: All importer types the registry knows about.

schema.title: Response List Types Admin Importers Types Get

post.description:
Probe the source with provided creds and list available items.

No DB writes — secrets stay in memory only. The wizard sends them
again on save (where they get encrypted).

schema.title: Response List Route Admin Importers  Get

post.description:
Kick off a run in the background. Returns immediately with the
importer id; poll `/{id}/runs` for the actual run row's progress.

We instantiate the importer up-front (without running it) so a
missing optional-dep package fails the request with a 422 +
pip-install hint instead of letting the background task swallow
the error into the run row.

schema.title: Response Runs Route Admin Importers  Importer Id  Runs Get

schema.title: Response Runs Route V1 Importers  Importer Id  Runs Get

get.description: Roll-up counters over the chunks table. Cheap — one indexed scan.

Per-source roll-up. `order=chunks` ranks by chunk count
(largest sources first); `order=recent` by most recent ingest.

schema.title: Response Sources V1 Corpus Sources Get
Response List All V1 Webhooks  Get
Response Update V1 Webhooks  Webhook Id  Patch
Response Deliveries V1 Webhooks  Webhook Id  Deliveries Get

post.description:
Reset a delivery row to `pending` + next_attempt_at=NOW. The
worker picks it up on the next tick.

schema.title: Response Redeliver V1 Webhooks  Webhook Id  Deliveries  Delivery Id  Redeliver Post

post.description:
Enqueue a synthetic `ping` event for this webhook only.

Useful for first-time setup — verifies URL + signing + receiver
parsing without waiting for a real importer run.

schema.title: Response Test V1 Webhooks  Webhook Id  Test Post

content.title: Content
content.description: The proposed fact or correction, in natural language.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.description: Sources backing the claim — URLs, logs, version refs.

submitted_by.title: Submitted By
submitted_by.description: Free-form attribution tag — stored verbatim, never trusted.

SearchHit.title: SearchHit
SearchHit.description:
One fact returned by ``/search``.

A fact is a graph edge — a one-line statement relating two entities
(``source_node_id`` and ``target_node_id``) extracted from a source
chunk (``episode_ids``). Clients that want more context either
drill into an entity via ``/fetch_entity`` or — usually preferred —
pull the original paragraph via ``/fetch_source``.
